L1.area: Message parsing and payment response handling

L2.description: An XML External Entity (XXE) vulnerability exists where XML input is parsed without disabling external entity resolution, allowing an attacker to read arbitrary files or perform server-side request forgery via crafted XML payloads.

L3.area: WeChat message and payment XML parsing routines
L3.description: An XML External Entity (XXE) vulnerability exists where XML input from WeChat API callbacks is parsed without disabling external entity resolution, allowing an attacker to inject external entity references into XML payloads to read arbitrary files or perform server-side request forgery.

ground_truth.reason: The XML parsing functions use etree.fromstring() without disabling external entity resolution, allowing attackers to inject XXE payloads via crafted XML input to read files or trigger SSRF.
